overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a neon-lit futuristic city at night. The character moves from a covered walkway under an elevated highway, crosses an intersection near a hotel, and continues along busy downtown streets with heavy vehicle traffic and towering glass buildings illuminated by colorful advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway beneath elevated highway

events.description: approaching the open intersection, exiting the covered overpass area

agents.ego_description: walking steadily beneath the elevated highway toward the neon-lit intersection ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in light-colored clothing walking past the camera from right to left

entered.detail: large illuminated billboard with 'EL GUAPO' text and animal graphic
purple neon hotel sign with Japanese text indicating vacancy
large cyan neon arrow sign with Japanese text indicating 24-hour business
massive concrete pillars and overhead highway structure creating partial cover
tall futuristic residential tower with multiple balconies and illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: The character walks beneath a massive concrete overpass in a futuristic city, with neon signs illuminating the path. The EL GUAPO billboard and a purple HOTEL sign glow on the right, while a large green arrow sign points ahead. A pedestrian passes by as the character approaches an open intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with hotel entrance and pedestrian crosswalk

events.description: exits covered walkway into open intersection with visible traffic and hotel entrance
crossing the street alongside other pedestrians while vehicles wait at the intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection toward the hotel entrance on the right side

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi waiting at the intersection for pedestrians to cross

entered.detail: covered entrance to the hotel with glass doors and red carpet
tall cylindrical digital screen displaying colorful advertisements
red and yellow painted stripes marking the pedestrian crossing

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from under the overpass into a wide urban intersection. The hotel entrance becomes prominent on the right as the character crosses the striped crosswalk alongside other pedestrians. A yellow taxi waits at the intersection while digital advertising pillars display bright content on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved pedestrian walkway with building facade and planters

events.description: following the curve of the sidewalk to the left around the building perimeter

agents.ego_description: walking along the curved sidewalk past metal railings and concrete planters

entered.detail: silver metal railings along the curved edge of the building
large rectangular planter containing palm trees and greenery
tall vertical digital screen displaying red and white graphic advertisements

segments.scene_description: The character follows a curved sidewalk lined with metal railings and large planters containing palm trees. A massive red digital billboard dominates the right side of the view, while the highrise building facade passes by closely on the left. The path curves gently left around the building perimeter.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy downtown street with vehicle traffic and overhead walkways

events.description: turning onto main thoroughfare with active vehicle traffic and overhead pedestrian bridges
blue sports car with headlights on drives past on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking down the busy street alongside moving traffic and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: blue sports car driving past with headlights illuminated

entered.detail: enclosed glass walkway connecting buildings overhead with metal framework
modern glass facade building with illuminated interior and signage
tall street light with orange glowing lamp and traffic signs attached

segments.scene_description: The character turns onto a busy main street lined with modern glass buildings and illuminated by street lamps. Vehicles including a blue sports car drive past on the right, while overhead glass pedestrian bridges span between the tall buildings. The scene features dense urban architecture with multiple levels of walkways and bright commercial signage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the sheltered shadows of a concrete overpass into the expansive, neon-drenched heart of a futuristic downtown. It begins beneath a massive highway structure where purple hotel signs and green directional arrows illuminate the path, moving forward as a pedestrian passes by. As the character emerges from the overpass, the scene opens into a wide urban intersection where the camera crosses a striped crosswalk past waiting yellow taxis and glowing digital advertising pillars. The path then curves along a sidewalk lined with palm trees and metal railings, shifting the focus toward a massive red digital billboard and the sleek facade of a high-rise building. Finally, the camera turns onto a busy main street, transitioning into a dense corridor of glass skyscrapers and overhead pedestrian bridges as blue sports cars stream past under the glow of commercial signage.
